details: iOS 27 to support Google Cast and third-party AirPlay alternatives for EU DMA compliance. WWDC 2026 set for June 8-12 with major Siri AI overhauls.
NVIDIA GTC AI conference in Taipei (June 1-4) during COMPUTEX. H200 sales prospects in China remain uncertain despite Jensen Huang's recent visit to Beijing.
Huawei unveiled a new scaling law and tech aiming for 1.4nm equivalent chips by 2031, narrowing the gap with TSMC and Samsung. Ascend 950PR production continues with improved compatibility.
ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 AI video model produced feature-length films showcased at Cannes. Planning $30 billion investment in AI infrastructure and computing systems.

product: Qwen AI / Pakistan Deal / AI Revenue Forecast
details: Alibaba signed a sweeping deal with Pakistan for Qwen AI integration. Forecasts 30 billion yuan AI revenue in 2026, with AI agents driving over half of cloud sales.
DeepSeek V4 Pro tops global bang-for-buck rankings after making a 75% price cut permanent.
Xiaomi pouring billions into AI and custom chips to rival Apple and future-proof its hardware and EV empire.
Honor 600 series with 8000mAh battery and WIN Turbo technology launching May 29.
